Kql: datatable(t:datetime, v:long)[ datetime(2021-01-01),5, datetime(2021-01-02),15 ] | make-series s = sum(v) default = 0 on t from datetime(2021-01-01) to datetime(2021-01-03) step 1d | extend tot = array_sum(s)
Sql: SELECT *, LIST_SUM(s) AS tot FROM (SELECT LIST(_axis._ts ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS t, LIST(COALESCE(s_val, 0) ORDER BY _ts) AS s FROM (SELECT UNNEST(range(TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2021-01-03 00:00:00', 86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')) AS _ts) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT EPOCH_MS(CAST(FLOOR(EPOCH_MS(t)/86400000)*86400000 AS BIGINT)) AS _bucket, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s_val FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', 5), (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-02 00:00:00', 15)) AS t(t, v) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket)

Kql: datatable(t:datetime, v:long)[ datetime(2021-01-01),5, datetime(2021-01-02),15 ] | make-series s = sum(v) default = 0 on t from datetime(2021-01-01) to datetime(2021-01-03) step 1d | extend mx = array_index_of(s, 15.0)
Sql: SELECT *, (LIST_POSITION(s, 15.0) - 1) AS mx FROM (SELECT LIST(_axis._ts ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS t, LIST(COALESCE(s_val, 0) ORDER BY _ts) AS s FROM (SELECT UNNEST(range(TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2021-01-03 00:00:00', 86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')) AS _ts) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT EPOCH_MS(CAST(FLOOR(EPOCH_MS(t)/86400000)*86400000 AS BIGINT)) AS _bucket, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s_val FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', 5), (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-02 00:00:00', 15)) AS t(t, v) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket)
